statements.impact_statement: All 28 hits matched the literal Go identifier 'pagerduty_create_incident' in test fixtures (capability/plugin name strings), not key values. The heuristic flags any source containing the vendor name; the matched strings have neither the entropy nor the length of an actual PagerDuty key.

vulnerability.name: SEC-163
vulnerability.description: High-entropy hex string detected (possible secret key)

statements.impact_statement: All 25 hits land in go.sum (Go module checksums are SHA-256 hashes by definition), .roady/spec.lock.json (content-addressed IDs), and .goreleaser.yaml ldflags template variables. No actual key material at any hit.

vulnerability.name: DATA-001
vulnerability.description: Email address in code or config

statements.impact_statement: 21 hits across test fixtures (handler unit tests using example.com / test addresses) and .claude/settings.local.json (local Claude Code agent state — gitignored at the parent level; should be excluded once nox issue Nox-HQ/nox#38 lands respect-gitignore-by-default). No production-PII at any hit.

vulnerability.name: IAC-013
vulnerability.description: GitHub Action pinned to mutable tag instead of commit SHA

statements.impact_statement: Same trade-off mnemos and chronos accept: tag-pinning gives Dependabot a refresh path that SHA-pinning blocks. Mitigation: dependabot config (committed) auto-opens PRs on action releases so updates flow through code review rather than auto-applying. Acceptable until the action's owner ships a malicious version, at which point the mitigation kicks in.
All 10 hits are test seed values (e.g. ECDSA-key generation in plugin/signature_test.go, idempotency-key fixtures). Test code; never reaches production binaries.
Hits .github/workflows/ci.yml services.postgres block — credentials for an ephemeral test container that lives for the duration of one workflow run. Not deployable secrets.

vulnerability.name: SEC-073
vulnerability.description: Database Connection String with credentials detected

statements.impact_statement: Same as SEC-430: ephemeral CI Postgres connection string in services block. Not a production credential.

vulnerability.name: IAC-254
vulnerability.description: Serverless environment variable with hardcoded secret

statements.impact_statement: Same as SEC-430: ephemeral CI Postgres test container env block. Not a production secret.
Same as SEC-430: ephemeral CI Postgres test variables. Not a production secret.

vulnerability.name: IAC-314
vulnerability.description: GHA workflow has contents write permission

statements.impact_statement: Hits .github/workflows/bench-publish.yml — the bench publisher legitimately needs contents:write to push the rendered docs/benchmarks.md branch. The peter-evans/create-pull-request action paired with this perm requires it; removing the perm breaks the workflow. Same accepted trade-off as mnemos and chronos.

vulnerability.name: IAC-315
vulnerability.description: GHA workflow has packages write permission

statements.impact_statement: Hits .github/workflows/release.yml — goreleaser legitimately needs packages:write to push the container image to GHCR. Required for releases; same trade-off as mnemos / chronos.

vulnerability.name: CONT-001
vulnerability.description: Container base image not pinned to specific digest

statements.impact_statement: Dockerfile uses `alpine:3.21` without a digest. Acceptable for development; production deploys should pin via `docker buildx imagetools inspect alpine:3.21` and update the FROM line with the returned sha256. Same gap mnemos has — both will pin together when their first production deploy ships. Tracking under SECURITY.md known gaps.
Single hit in README.md matched the word 'Slack' adjacent to a placeholder token-shaped string in example documentation. Not a real token.
Hits in test fixtures referencing the word 'LOB'. The matched strings are not LOB API keys; the heuristic fired on substring match alone. Sister case to SEC-545 / SEC-437.

vulnerability.name: SEC-162
vulnerability.description: High-entropy base64 blob detected (possible encoded secret)

statements.impact_statement: Hits in .roady/spec.lock.json (content-addressed task IDs encoded as base64). Roady project-management metadata; no secret content.

vulnerability.name: DATA-005
vulnerability.description: Hardcoded public IP address in configuration

statements.impact_statement: Hits docker-compose.yml example bindings (typically 127.0.0.1 / 0.0.0.0 / loopback ranges). Local-development examples; not deployment configuration.
